summary: Iteration 189 testing complete: Power Spots Admin CRUD + Go-Live + Broadcasts, Celestial Layer with 6 constellation nodes + alignment + quadratic decay. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: PowerSpotAdmin page at /admin/power-spot with Leaflet map, deployed spots list, Go Live toggle, Edit/Delete buttons. CosmicMap page at /cosmic-map with Ground/Celestial layer toggle working correctly - Ground shows Leaflet map with nodes, Celestial shows star chart canvas with constellation nodes.
critical_code_review_comments: Power Spots CRUD correctly implemented with proper 404 handling for nonexistent spots
Go-Live toggle creates broadcast notifications stored in broadcasts collection
Celestial nodes return 6 hardcoded constellation nodes with RA/Dec coordinates converted to chart_x/chart_y
Celestial alignment requires 60% minimum accuracy - returns success=false with message if below threshold
Quadratic decay uses formula 0.9^(t^2) for celestial resonance - more aggressive than linear decay
PowerSpotAdmin page correctly uses Leaflet with MapClickHandler for dropping pins
CosmicMap layer toggle properly switches between Leaflet MapContainer and CelestialChart canvas
GET /api/cosmic-map/power-spots only returns active=True spots (filter applied in query)
seed_data_creation: Test spots created and cleaned up during tests (TEST_ prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 189 Power Spots and Celestial features all working. PowerSpotAdmin at /admin/power-spot shows Leaflet map where clicking drops a pin for new spot creation. Deployed spots show lat/lng, multiplier, Go Live/Edit/Delete buttons. CosmicMap at /cosmic-map has Ground/Celestial toggle - Ground shows Leaflet map with procedural nodes + power spots, Celestial shows canvas star chart with 6 constellation nodes (Orion's Gate, Sirius Nexus, Pleiades Beacon, Vega Alignment, Polaris Lock, Antares Bridge). Celestial alignment requires 60%+ accuracy. Auth flow: /auth page, 'Begin Journey' button, dismiss trial modal with 'Continue with free plan'.

backend_apis.GET /api/cosmic-map/power-spots: Returns active power spots with harvested status
backend_apis.POST /api/cosmic-map/power-spots: Creates new power spot with id, name, lat, lng, multiplier
backend_apis.PUT /api/cosmic-map/power-spots/{spot_id: Updates spot fields, returns 404 if not found
backend_apis.DELETE /api/cosmic-map/power-spots/{spot: Deletes spot, returns 404 if not found
backend_apis.POST /api/cosmic-map/power-spots/{spot_i: Toggles active status, creates broadcast when going live
backend_apis.GET /api/cosmic-map/celestial/nodes: Returns 6 celestial nodes with RA/Dec, frequency, chart_x/chart_y
backend_apis.POST /api/cosmic-map/celestial/align: Aligns with node if accuracy >= 0.6, returns 404 for invalid node
backend_apis.POST /api/cosmic-map/power-spots/harvest: Harvests spot if within radius, returns 400 if too far, 404 if inactive

features: HUD with coordinates and node counts
Canvas star chart on Celestial layer
Node detail panel with harvest/align buttons
